action_set_definitions.name: get_robot_fleet_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of all robots in the fleet, including their battery levels, current locations, and operational status (idle/busy).

action_set_definitions.name: get_aisle_status
action_set_definitions.description: Checks a specific aisle to identify any robots or obstacles currently occupying the space.

aisle_id.description: The ID of the aisle to inspect (e.g., 'Aisle-12').

action_set_definitions.name: move_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a specific robot to move to a designated location or charging dock.

robot_id.description: The ID of the robot to move.

action_set_definitions.name: assign_delivery_task
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a specific package delivery task to a robot.

robot_id.description: The ID of the robot assigned to the task.

package_id.description: The ID of the package to be delivered.

pickup_location.description: The location where the package is located.

state_description.robots: List of active robots in the warehouse with their current attributes.
state_description.tasks: List of pending and active warehouse tasks.
state_description.warehouse_map: Adjacency list or distance matrix representing the warehouse layout.
